rows.label: xs08060100_MSG0002
rows.name: This is the Earth Human Settlement[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08060100_MSG0003
rows.name:
Commander of the New Los Angeles
Defense Force, General Vandham![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08060100_MSG0006
rows.name:
It's adding prestige for negotiating
with the Growth forces.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08060100_MSG0007
rows.name:
Compared to being the commander of a civilian organization,
he likely thought this sounds more authoritative.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08060100_SEL0021
rows.name:
Give a wry smile, finding
it doesn't quite fit.

rows.label: xs08060100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Somehow, that buff feeling is
kind of General-like, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08060100_MSG0011
rows.name:
Regardless of the title, there's no
doubting his ability as a commander.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08060100_MSG0012
rows.name:
Commander or General, does it
really matter either way?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08060100_MSG0013
rows.name:
The image of him as "General"
is stuck in my head now.[ST:wait ]
